description:
Create a 3-level Product Category hierarchy for 'Smart Home Technologies' and reassign three existing products to their appropriate sub-categories.

Required hierarchy:
- 'Smart Home Technologies' (Top Level)
- 'Security' (Parent: 'Smart Home Technologies')
- 'Automation' (Parent: 'Smart Home Technologies')
- 'Cameras' (Parent: 'Security')
- 'Sensors' (Parent: 'Security')

Product assignments:
- 'WiFi Doorbell Camera 4K' to 'Cameras'
- 'Motion Sensor Pro' to 'Sensors'
- 'Smart Hub Controller' to 'Automation'

Login credentials: Username 'admin', Password 'Admin1234!'
